reason: Adds GitHub-identified Zenodo upload-and-publish automation with explicit typed publish confirmation.
token_policy: No token stored in repository. Zenodo access token must be generated owner-side in the Zenodo account authenticated via GitHub login.
github_identity_policy: GITHUB_USERNAME is required or prompted. Optional GITHUB_TOKEN verifies ownership via GitHub API. GitHub token is not sent to Zenodo.
publish_policy: Script completes publish only after owner types exact confirmation PUBLISH QIKVRT.
no_false_pass: Verifier checks only local repository and script properties; live Zenodo publish remains owner-side NOT_EXECUTED_IN_SANDBOX.
